summary.intent: Review project status for the metrics dashboard and restructure the PRD documents so the master PRD covers both the completed BTC dashboard and the new AI Metrics Dashboard, with a focused delta doc for sprint implementation work.
summary.outcome: prd.md was rewritten as an umbrella master PRD (Phase 1: BTC dashboard ✅, Phase 2: AI Metrics Dashboard), and prd-ai-metrics-dashboard.md was trimmed to a lean sprint reference delta containing only implementation-specific details (metrics table, API breakdown, cache schema).

repo: The project uses a BMAD workflow framework with agents (Architect=Winston, Scrum Master=Bob) and structured phase gates (Phases 1–4: discovery, planning, solutioning, implementation).
Both the BTC dashboard and AI Metrics Dashboard share the same Astro + Tailwind codebase — they are phases of one product, not separate repos.
Workflow commands follow the pattern bmad-bmm-<workflow-name> and must each be run in a fresh context window.
_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/ holds PRD and readiness report artifacts; _bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/ holds sprint-status.yaml.

code.finding: Rewritten as umbrella master PRD with shared technical foundation section, Phase 1 (BTC, complete), and Phase 2 (AI Metrics Dashboard) merged in.
Trimmed to sprint reference delta: 20 metrics quick-reference table, fetch script API breakdown, cache JSON schema contract, and pointers to master PRD.

workflow: Splitting a PRD into master + delta works well when two products share infrastructure but have distinct implementation scopes — the delta stays open during sprints without noise from completed phases.
The Implementation Readiness Check (Phase 3) must be re-run or resumed after architecture/epics docs are updated to reflect new PRD scope.

friction: The Implementation Readiness Check started earlier today but only completed Step 1 (document discovery) — it stalled before validating the new PRD against architecture and epics docs.
The existing architecture.md and epics.md are scoped to the BTC dashboard (last updated 2026-03-25) and do not yet cover the AI Metrics Dashboard, which blocks the readiness check from passing.
open_items: Update architecture.md to cover the AI Metrics Dashboard scope (new fetch architecture, 20 metrics, cache schema).
Update epics.md with new epics and stories for the AI Metrics Dashboard phase.
Re-run Implementation Readiness Check (bmad-bmm-check-implementation-readiness) in a fresh context after architecture and epics docs are updated.
Optionally run Epic Retrospective (bmad-bmm-retrospective) for completed Epics 1–4 before starting Phase 4.
Run Sprint Planning (bmad-bmm-sprint-planning) once IR passes to kick off AI Metrics Dashboard implementation.
